iti72:1.1: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti72:2.1: “Monks, there are these three properties for escape.
iti72:2.3:
This is the escape from sensuality:
renunciation.
This is the escape from form:
formlessness.
And as for whatever has come into being, is fabricated & dependently co-arisen, the escape from that is cessation.
iti72:2.4: These are the three properties for escape.”
iti72:3.4: –ardent always– touching the stilling of all fabrications:
iti72:4.1: he is a monk who’s seen rightly.
iti72:4.2: From that he is there released.
iti72:4.3: A master of direct knowing, at peace,
iti72:4.4: he is a sage gone beyond bonds.
